context_for_next_testing_agent: iter188 fully tested. Features: (1) PanelHost.tsx refactored from 2494 to 1814 lines - memoized Panel component extracted to /app/client/components/site/panel-host/Panel.tsx (715 lines); (2) SMS Template Editor added to Daily Briefing Admin panel with data-testids: briefing-admin-template-root, briefing-admin-template-sms, briefing-admin-template-email-subject, briefing-admin-template-email-headline, briefing-admin-template-email-intro, briefing-admin-template-save, briefing-admin-template-reset, briefing-admin-template-sms-count, briefing-admin-template-preview-sms/-email, briefing-admin-template-preview-sms-body, briefing-admin-template-preview-email-body, briefing-admin-template-dirty; (3) Backend endpoints: GET /api/daily-briefing/template (returns template + placeholders + defaults), POST /api/daily-briefing/template (validates {link} required, max 500 chars), POST /api/daily-briefing/template/reset (restores defaults); (4) Template rendering integrated into /api/standup/send fan-out and /api/daily-briefing/flush-queue. MOCKED: Twilio SMS and Resend email - all paths take graceful queue fallback when keys not set.
